label: Color
description: Pick a color and send it to a device.
whenToUse: Set the color of a smart light or RGB device — Hue bulbs, LED strips, ambient lighting. Drag the wheel for hue and saturation, set brightness below; sends on release and reflects the latest reported color.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><circle cx="12" cy="8.2" r="1.5" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="8.2" cy="13.6" r="1.5" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="15.8" cy="13.6" r="1.5" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>
